Name: XIAO ESP32-S3 chip with sense expansion board
Description: Camera and for running the code
Notes: Color must be "XIAO ESP32 S3 Sense" for both the chip and expansion board

Name: Lipo 3.7V 500mAh battery
Description: For powering all parts of the project
Notes: I used amazon for this so I can still have a 500mAh battery and have enough time to build

Name: Bone Conduction Speaker
Notes: This has 5 speakers but I will only be using 1 and all of the others are more expensive with than this pack

Name: Adafruit Mono Amp
Notes: This has different positioned pins than the one I have in my wiring plan but it seems that all of them are like this

Name: On/Off Switch
Description: To enable and disable the power.
Notes: This product comes in packs of 5 as a minimum but I will only be using one the reason I picked this one is because it is very small

Name: 3.3v ldo regulator
Notes: Choose color MINI 3.3V-5PCS AND it is a pack of 5 but I only need one and this is the cheapest

Name: Soldering iron
Description: To attach wires to other parts
Notes: I chose the color 7 in 1 blue EU because it is the same price and gives me some extra attachments but if the sale ends I will get the normal version

Name: Solder
Notes: Choose type 100 grams because it is the same price as 50 grams and it is better to have extra than not enough

Name: Heatshrink Tubing
Description: Can cover wires for safety and looks
Notes: Choose Color: 127PCS bags Black AND there are 120ish pieces of tubing and I wont use it all but it is the cheapest option availble
